# deletePrincipal

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the deletePrincipal mutation

## Usage

```typescript
db.mutation.deletePrincipal({ input: { principalId: '<UUID>' } }).execute()
```

## Examples

### Run deletePrincipal

```typescript
const result = await db.mutation.deletePrincipal({ input: { principalId: '<UUID>' } }).execute();
```
